prompts.name: Monotone Smooth Transition
prompts.description: Painted texture variation, single color faded wash
prompts.text: monotone single color smooth transition, faded single color wash background using only ${color1}, soft gradients between light and dark values of the same hue, subtle painted texture, no other colors, no objects, no details, colors extend to all edges

prompts.name: Diagonal Gradient
prompts.description: Directional gradient, single color with value variation
prompts.text: diagonal gradient from light ${color1} in top-left corner fading to darker ${color1} in bottom-right corner, smooth seamless transition, no texture, no patterns, colors extend to all edges

prompts.name: Blurred Atmospheric Mist
prompts.text: blurred areas of ${color1} dissolving into soft atmospheric mist with all edges completely softened and blended into a smooth dreamy haze

prompts.name: Atmospheric Single-Color Haze
prompts.text: atmospheric single-color haze in ${color1}, like looking through tinted fog, subtle value shifts, no forms, no texture, pure color field, colors extend to all edges

prompts.name: Extremely Blurred Haze
prompts.text: Create an extremely blurred and hazy background where soft textures completely melt away into pure atmospheric fog, with heavily diffused gradients of light ${color1} and dark ${color1} that dissolve into each other with maximum blur and dreamy softness.
